name: H2O Generalized Low Rank Models
description: Generalized Low Rank Models (GLRM) is an algorithm for dimensionality reduction of a dataset
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input

fields.name: transform
fields.title: Transform
fields.description: Transformation to apply to the training data before fitting the model.

fields.name: k
fields.title: K
fields.description: The rank of the matrix approximation (number of archetypes to find).

fields.name: ignoredCols
fields.title: Ignored Columns
fields.description: Columns to exclude from the model building process.

fields.name: columnsToCategorical
fields.title: Columns to Categorical
fields.description: Numeric columns that should be treated as categorical/factors.

fields.name: loss
fields.title: Loss
fields.description: Loss function for numeric columns (e.g., Quadratic for Gaussian data).

fields.name: multiLoss
fields.title: Multi Loss
fields.description: Loss function for categorical/enum columns.

fields.name: period
fields.title: Period
fields.description: Length of the period; only used when loss function is 'Periodic'.

fields.name: regularizationX
fields.title: Regularization X
fields.description: Regularization function for the X matrix (Archetype weights).

fields.name: regularizationY
fields.title: Regularization Y
fields.description: Regularization function for the Y matrix (Archetype features).

fields.name: gammaX
fields.title: Gamma X
fields.description: Regularization weight (strength) for the X matrix.

fields.name: gammaY
fields.title: Gamma Y
fields.description: Regularization weight (strength) for the Y matrix.

fields.name: maxIterations
fields.title: Max Iterations
fields.description: Maximum number of iterations allowed for the optimization.

fields.name: maxUpdates
fields.title: Max Updates
fields.description: Maximum number of updates for the matrices.

fields.name: initStepSize
fields.title: Init Step Size
fields.description: Initial step size for the gradient descent.

fields.name: minStepSize
fields.title: Min Step Size
fields.description: Minimum step size; optimization stops if it falls below this value.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Seed for reproducibility. Use -1 for a random seed.

fields.name: init
fields.title: Init
fields.description: Method used to initialize the X and Y matrices.

fields.name: svdMethod
fields.title: SVD Method
fields.description: Method for computing SVD if Init is set to 'SVD'.

fields.name: loadingName
fields.title: Loading Name
fields.description: [Deprecated] Use Representation Name instead.

fields.name: representationName
fields.title: Representation Name
fields.description: Frame key to save the resulting X matrix (low-rank representation).

fields.name: expandUserY
fields.title: Expand User Y
fields.description: Whether to expand categorical columns in user-specified initial Y matrix.

fields.name: imputeOriginal
fields.title: Impute Original
fields.description: Reconstruct the original training data by reversing the transformation.

fields.name: recoverSvd
fields.title: Recover SVD
fields.description: Recover the singular values and eigenvectors of the XY product.

fields.name: ignoreConstCols
fields.title: Ignore Constant Columns
fields.description: Discard columns with only one unique value.

fields.name: scoreEachIteration
fields.title: Score Each Iteration
fields.description: Whether to calculate objective function value during each iteration.

fields.name: maxRuntimeSecs
fields.title: Max Runtime Secs
fields.description: Maximum time allowed for model training in seconds. 0 means no limit.

fields.name: inputCols
fields.title: Input Columns
fields.description: Columns to be used as input for the GLRM.

fields.name: reconstructedCol
fields.title: Reconstructed Column
fields.description: Name for the column containing reconstructed data.

fields.name: maxScoringIterations
fields.title: Max Scoring Iterations
fields.description: Max scoring iterations during model building.
